name: Donut
description: Your first donut

name: Powdered Donut
description: The beginning of a long journey

name: Frosted White
description: I'm pretty sure the frosting is vanilla flavored, never checked myself though

name: Frosted Chocolate
description: The beginning of a chocolate journey

name: No-Hole Donut
description: FYI this donut is not filled, it is simply a donut without a purpose

name: White Sprinkled
description: Despite sprinkles being nothing but sugar, they make the donut taste to much better

name: Chocolate Sprinkled
description: Arguably the most popular donut to ever exist, according to me

name: Glazed
description: The kind of donut you always see but never try, or is that just me...

name: Chocolate Powdered
description: Guy who made this was like "man, I sure wish these powdered donuts were chocolate flavored"

name: Jelly Donut
description: Don't ask me what flavor the jelly is, it's probably grape flavored idk

name: Long John
description: One of those donut poster-children, but it's literally just Frosted Chocolate stretched out

name: Crumble Crave
description: You'd be lucky if EVERYTHING YOU ARE isn't covered in crumbs by the end of this

name: Caramel Dip
description: "Sir, I thought we were only supposed to dip the apples in caramel" SILENCE PEASANT

name: Donut Hole
description: You have your hole life ahead of you, so why not make the most of it

name: Glazed Donut Hole
description: Don't expect others to glaze you for your success, it only makes them less willing

name: Powdered Donut Hole
description: With the powder of friendship, anything can be possible

name: Chocolate Glazed Donut Hole
description: Maybe the true Chocolate Glazed Donut Holes were the friends we made along the way

name: Chocolate Glazed Donut
description: If you think this is a lot of chocolate, boy do I have a few things to show you

name: White Jimmy
description: Long John's older brother Jimmy, he's pretty chill I'd argue

name: Chocolate Filling
description: Gosh I could really go for some chocolate fudge right now... Oh would you look at that

name: Naked Sprinkled
description: AHHH HES NAKED! COVER THE CHILDRENS' EYES! CALL THE COPS!

name: Jimmy Sprinkles
description: Thank goodness you're here, Jimmy. The craziest thing happened, there was like this naked guy

name: John Sprinkles
description: Dangggg you wear those sprinkles good, John! You should become a fashion designer

name: Sprinkled Caramel Dip
description: Caramel I know gosh darn well you're only wearing those sprinkles because everyone else is

name: Bronze Donut
description: Congradulations on acquiring 25 different kinds of donuts! Enjoy this bronze med- I mean donut

name: Apple Strudel
description: Crumble Crave if it was actually good, bro this is literally 'Apple Pie: The Donut'

name: No-Hole Powdered
description: Are these even donuts anymore? WHO ARE YOU? WHAT DO YOU WANT?

name: No-Hole Sprinkled
description: Looks like somebody forgot to put their lipstick on~ Wait... what is the human variant of frosting?

name: No-Hole Chocolate
description: Not to be confused with Boston Creme, this one lacks the iconic Creme

name: Creme Filling
description: Not to be confused with Boston Creme, this one lacks the iconic... Boston...

name: Valentine
description: Be sure to give this one to someone you care about, or eat it yourself you biggie

name: Love Donut
description: Don't let it fool you... this is just the Strawberry Donut shaped like a heart, nothing more

name: Trick or Treat
description: You know you wish those sprinkles were Peanut Butter flavored. But deep down, you know they're just sugar

name: Pumpkin Surprise
description: Gosh I sure do wonder what the surprise is! Could be butterscotch perhaps?

name: Snowball
description: Boy they sure love their seasonals... Do these even make that many sales? I've rarely gotten them myself

name: Ho Ho Hole!
description: Anytime you feel down, just snow that I'm always here for you

name: Saint Patrick's Donut
description: FYI this is NOT Patrick's donut, last I checked that dude HATED the color green

name: Sunset Sprinkles
description: Ngl I'd love to try this donut, it looks like it's berry flavored

name: Berry Blast
description: Well speak of the devil, if it isn't the actual berry flavor

name: Boston Creme
description: The fillings of Boston Creme fill you with Determination, or is that just more Boston Creme that you're feeling

name: Jelly Dip
description: Jeeze we gotta stop dipping these donuts in such sticky substances, they're way too messy

name: Triple Choc Dare
description: THIS... IS TO GO... EVEN... FURTHER... BEYOND... RAHHHHHHHHHHH!!!!!

name: Zebra Donut
description: Made with real chocolate and vanilla, 100% zebra free this time

name: Half Sprinkle
description: WHO THOUGHT THIS WAS A GOOD IDEA????

name: Cookie Dough-nut
description: Eyyyy? See what I did there ;) ? Thank you thank you, I'm here all week

name: Mint Chocolate Chip
description: That's... a donut flavor now? Welp, might as well try one

name: American
description: Mmmmmm, Aluminum spray paint flavor, my favorite!

name: Neapolitan
description: So we're just doing ice cream flavors. AM I A JOKE TO YOU?

name: Rainbow Sprinkled
description: Don't let the different, more colorful sprinkles fool you. It's still just sugar

name: Silver Donut
description: You're at the 50 donut mark, you go girl! You're quite familiar with these donuts, aren't you

name: Eye Donut
description: Eye eat you~

name: White Rabbit
description: Donut Clicker Tip: Don't follow the White Rabbit

name: Gun Donut
description: And just how did you get past donut security?

name: Blood Donut
description: P.S. NOT REAL BLOOD! It's actually ketchup

name: A wHole Donut!
description: You... Can't just... Do that??

name: Player Donut
description: It's the Donut behind the slaughter!

name: Chocolate & Powdered
description: I've actually had one of these before, tastes pretty good ngl

name: Spider Donut
description: Made by Donuts, for Donuts, with Donuts

name: UwU Donut
description: Look, some of these I made back in 2021, ok? I was a different person back then

name: Double-Nut
description: Prepare for trouble! And make it double!

name: Double-Nut Sprinkled
description: Let's take this time to just reflect on how many donuts you've eaten by now, how are you still alive?

name: Frosted No-Hole
description: The most "I've never seen one, but it probably exists" donut on this list

name: Ocean Blue
description: I thought this was a soda flavor??? WAIT ARE THOSE TINY FISH GUMMIES

name: Donut... Again?!
description: Your sixty-fourth donut

name: Flushed Donut
description: Me when I see a cute Donut lady, yknow what I'm sayin? You wouldn't get it...

name: Dapper Donut
description: So refined! So dashing! I wonder where this lil guy is off to

name: Australian Donut
description: Donut hasn't felt the same ever since the great Temu war...

name: Anti-Donut
description: Luckily this Donut isn't an actual ANTI, or else we'd be in big trouble

name: Devil Donut
description: Don't listen to the Donut on your shoulder, he tells nothing but lies

name: Holy Donut
description: Ever find it oddly coincidental that Donuts are in the shape of halos? Or is it a coincidence...?

name: Steampunk Donut
description: PLEASE DONT EAT THE COG DONUT! IT TASTES LIKE BRONZE! What's that? You already ate some bronze earlier? Oh for crying out loud.

name: Not Shaded Donut
description: WHO UNSHADED MY DONUT?! I WAS SAVING THAT FOR LATER >:(

name: Mohawk Donut
description: "Totally radical dude!!" is what I would say if I had lost my mind, which luckily hasn't happened yet

name: Bagel
description: Your first bagel

name: Pure Golden Donut
description: You really don't remember who you are? Well, you'll find out soon enough, one more checkpoint to go...

name: Epic Donut
description: Despite the illegally obtained sunglasses, this dude is pretty awesome

name: King Donut
description: Pfffft this guy thinks he's the king of donuts? Just wait til he finds out

name: Code Donut
description: Don't try deciphering the binary, whoever made this probably just spammed their numpad

name: Donut Donut
description: Your first donut donut donut donut donut donut donut donut donut donut donut donut

name: Minecraft Donut
description: It tastes like square... I don't like the taste of square...

name: Transparent Donut
description: W- Why is it see through? Is it even safe to eat? Bahhhh who cares

name: OwO Donut
description: Despite being made back in 2021, I choose to keep it in for the funny

name: Apple Donut
description: Gee I sure hope there are no Paddles around here!

name: Diamond Donut
description: I don't even know how you're going to bite into this one

name: Ruby Donut
description: Mmmmm ruby, my favorite flavor of shattered teeth

name: Emerald Donut
description: I betcha could trade this one for a couple loaves of bread

name: Spinel Donut
description: Don't worry, this one wont try and kill you... I think

name: Peridot Donut
description: Do you think this one is lime flavored? Hopefully not keylime, I hate keylime

name: Topaz Donut
description: The lemon to Peridot's lime, aweeee they should get married!

name: Citrine Donut
description: What, are we just going through all the citrus themed gems now?

name: Jasper Donut
description: Close enough to grapefruit

name: Onyx Donut
description: WARNING: Quick Claw not included

name: Amethyst Donut
description: Gee I sure hope there aren't 5 unsuspecting Donut Holes around here

name: Turquiose Donut
description: The donut of the ocean... I think? Is there even water where we are right now?

name: Sapphire Donut
description: Why does sapphire have a double P? It's not like we pronounce the P anyways

name: White Opal Donut
description: Just how did somebody make these gem donuts? You'd be lucky to find some of these gems bigger than your fingernail

name: Jade Donut
description: Have you noticed yet how the upgrade backgrounds line up with these gems? Pretty cool huh

name: Alexandrite Donut
description: Amethyst if it was lavender flavored. And just who is alex anyways?

name: Tourmaline Donut
description: I'll have you guess what this one tastes like... That's right! ROCKS

name: Rainbow Donut
description: Welcome back, Donita

name: Venus Donut
description: Not the planet Venus, the annoying little brat Venus

name: Mars Donut
description: Don't worry his head's not actually on fire, it's just his hair-do

name: Pluto Donut
description: Despite being named "Pluto", he's actually the tallest of us

name: Saturn Donut
description: That's an oddly donut shaped ring you have there

name: Nova Donut
description: Those headphones aren't connected to anything, she just wears them for fun

name: Nebula Donut
description: Oh Nebula, if only things had turned out differently

name: Red Ronut
description: Rour rirst ronut

name: Donuty
description: How could you have a Donut clicker and not include Donuty! He's literally Mr. Donut himself

name: Joey Donut
description: This Donut used to be served at the local Joey's diner, before it mysteriously vanished

name: Frankincense Donut
description: We also have him in molten flavor

name: Hankerchief Donut
description: The evil tiny teeth of murder are coming after your ankles

name: Arson Donut
description: He looks mildly infuriated to be a donut

name: Ded Donut
description: NOOOOOOOO WHO KILLED MY DONUT :(

name: Doreo
description: Yes, that is two donuts stacked on top of eachother with frosting in the middle, don't try this at home

name: Mr. Eye Donut
description: Eye Mr. you~

name: Floral Donut
description: P.S. not actually a donut, it's just a very neatly trimmed flower bush

name: Cact-o-Nut
description: Goodluck eating this one

name: Donut Spinner
description: Now you can eat Donuts without ever getting bored!

name: Dough - No, too much frosting
description: Speak for yourself, this is the RIGHT amount of frosting baby

name: Dough - No, too many sprinkles
description: You... All you did was make the Donut crunchier

name: Donetta
description: Now there's that cute Donut chick I was taking about, you still wouldn't get it

name: sghaFasdjgasgDShjaihasHrajs;gr
description: Uhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhh

name: Ignore that last one :)
description: Probably best you listen to that advice, that is if you enjoy keeping your sanity

name: Copper Donut
description: Your brother seemed nice, I can't imagine how hard it'd be if you two ever separate

name: Tree Nut
description: So this is what people are allergic to?

name: Apple Tree Nut
description: The life cycle of an Apple Donut

name: Youtube Donut
description: HELLO FELLOW DONUTEERS AND WELCOME TO ANOTHER AWESOME DONUT CLICKER 2 LETS PLAY

name: TikTok Donut
description: Mmmmm, tastes like 5 hours just spent sitting on the bed

name: Dionut
description: "Waiter! There seems to be a Dio in my Donut!"

name: Taxes Donut
description: Just wait til the IRS find out about this one

name: Pumpkin Donut
description: You... can't just carve a hole in a pumpkin and call it a Donut...

name: Donut Emoji
description: Your first emoji... Wait no shoot we already had flushed donut

name: Baldonut
description: What's 9 donuts plus 10 donuts? Eyyyy? Aren't I hilarious

name: Scarlet Crimson
description: This one looks like it eats Blood Donuts for breakfast

name: Dot Nut King
description: W- What are you doing here?

name: Donutzart
description: Gosh he needs his own rhythm game

name: RGB Donut
description: Tastes like I need to get a new GPU
